overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a foggy industrial dock at night in a video game setting (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves along a wet concrete pier beside a large cargo ship, passing under massive gantry cranes while vehicles occasionally drive on the adjacent road, with orange sodium lights cutting through the heavy mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dockside walkway beside cargo ship

events.description: camera pans left to reveal the water and the side of the large cargo ship

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dockside path beside the large cargo ship, glancing toward the water

entered.detail: short black metal posts lining the edge of the dock walkway
large white and orange cargo vessel docked at the pier with multiple decks
elevated command structure on the cargo ship with illuminated windows
massive industrial crane framework with hanging container visible in the fog
tall poles with warm orange sodium lights illuminating the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial dock at night, with the camera moving forward past black bollards. A massive cargo ship dominates the left side, its control tower becoming prominent as the camera approaches. Around the 12-second mark, the view pans left to reveal the dark water beside the ship before continuing along the concrete walkway. Orange street lamps pierce the mist on the right, while industrial structures fade into the foggy distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area with vehicle traffic on adjacent road

events.description: dark sedan with headlights on passes by on the right side road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock walkway as the cargo ship recedes into the fog behind

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the adjacent dock road, headlights cutting through the fog

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen visible through the fog in the distance
metal railing separating the walkway from the vehicle road

segments.scene_description: Moving past the cargo ship, the dock opens up to reveal the water on the left and a road with sparse vehicle traffic on the right. A dark sedan passes by at 25 seconds, its headlights reflecting off the wet pavement. The large gantry crane structure looms larger ahead, while a digital billboard becomes visible through the fog on the right. The cargo ship gradually recedes into the mist behind as the walkway continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial gate structure with overhead gantry crane

events.description: passing under the massive gantry crane portal structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing under the massive gantry crane structure, continuing along the dock

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the massive gantry crane structure that spans the dock like a portal. At 45 seconds, the camera passes directly underneath the towering metal framework. The digital billboard on the right becomes clearer, displaying colorful graphics against the night sky. The cargo ship is now completely behind, and the dock continues into the foggy distance with industrial structures visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy industrial dock at night that transitions from the side of a massive cargo ship to the underside of a towering gantry crane. It begins by moving past black bollards with the ship's control tower dominating the left, briefly panning toward the dark water before continuing along a concrete walkway illuminated by orange street lamps. As the cargo ship gradually recedes into the mist, the scene opens up to reveal a road on the right where a dark sedan passes, its headlights reflecting off the wet pavement. The camera then advances toward a looming metal framework, passing a glowing digital billboard with colorful graphics before gliding directly underneath the massive gantry crane. Finally, the view extends into the foggy distance toward industrial structures on the horizon as the ship disappears completely behind the camera.
